faqs.question: How quickly can you provide drain fly treatment in East Harlem?
faqs.answer: We offer same-day and next-day service throughout East Harlem, Manhattan. Our team can typically arrive within 24 hours of your call to assess and begin treating your drain fly problem, with most treatments completed in a single visit.

faqs.question: What does the $350 - $550 drain fly treatment include?
faqs.answer: Our drain fly treatment includes a thorough inspection to locate breeding sites, professional-grade bio-enzyme treatments for affected drains, mechanical cleaning of drain lines, application of targeted residual products, and a follow-up visit if needed. The final price depends on the severity of infestation and number of drains requiring treatment.

faqs.question: Why are drain flies common in East Harlem buildings?
faqs.answer: East Harlem's many older buildings often have aging plumbing systems with organic buildup in drain lines, creating ideal breeding conditions for drain flies. High-density housing, shared plumbing systems, and moisture from bathrooms and kitchens contribute to drain fly populations, especially during warmer months.

faqs.question: How can I prevent drain flies from returning after treatment?
faqs.answer: Regular drain cleaning and maintenance are key to preventing drain fly recurrence. We recommend weekly hot water flushes, monthly bio-enzyme treatments, keeping drains covered when not in use, and fixing any leaks promptly. Our technicians will provide specific prevention tips based on your East Harlem property's unique plumbing situation.
